## Checklist

- [ ] I built and tested the affected package(s) (`cd <package> && npm test`)
- [ ] I added/updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] I updated relevant docs (README / DEPLOYMENT / package READMEs)

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or local absolute paths are included
